name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusionN ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, flag, turn

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

Next == \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = p
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<state, flag, turn>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, flag, turn>>

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N, Participants

VARIABLES state, votes, messages



TypeOK == /\ state \in {"INIT", "PREPARE", "COMMIT", "ABORT"}
          /\ votes \in Seq(Participants)
          /\ messages \in Seq([sender : Participants \cup {"COORDINATOR"})

Init == /\ state = "INIT"
        /\ votes = <<>>
        /\ messages = <<>>

Prepare == /\ state = "INIT"
           /\ state' = "PREPARE"
           /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender -> "COORDINATOR", receiver -> p, type -> "PREPARE"]) \* for each participant p

VoteYes == /\ state = "PREPARE"
           /\ state' = "PREPARE"
           /\ votes' = Append(votes, m.sender)
           /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender -> m.sender, receiver -> "COORDINATOR", type -> "VOTE_YES"])

VoteNo == /\ state = "PREPARE"
          /\ state' = "ABORT"
          /\ votes' = votes
          /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender -> m.sender, receiver -> "COORDINATOR", type -> "VOTE_NO"])

Commit == /\ state = "PREPARE"
          /\ Len(votes) = N
          /\ state' = "COMMIT"
          /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender -> "COORDINATOR", receiver -> p, type -> "COMMIT"]) \* for each participant p

Abort == /\ state = "PREPARE"
         /\ Len(votes) < N
         /\ state' = "ABORT"
         /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender -> "COORDINATOR", receiver -> p, type -> "ABORT"]) \* for each participant p

Next == \/ Prepare
        \/ VoteYes
        \/ VoteNo
        \/ Commit
        \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, votes, messages>> /\ TypeOK

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks are represented as a set of indices of philosophers who currently hold them *)
(* State is a sequence of length N where each entry is one of "thinking", "hungry", or "eating" *)

TypeOK == /\ forks \in SUBSET {1..N}
          /\ state \in {1..N} -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

Init == /\ forks = {}
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : state[i] = "hungry" /\ i \notin forks /\ (i % N) + 1 \notin forks
          /\ forks' = forks \cup {i, (i % N) + 1}
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : state[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = forks \ {i, (i % N) + 1}
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : state[i] = "thinking"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          /\ forks' = forks

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>> /\ TypeOK

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

TypeOK == /\ q \in [1..K -> Nat]
          /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K

Enqueue(x) == /\ size < K
             /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = x]
             /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
             /\ size' = size + 1
             /\ head' = head

Dequeue == /\ size > 0
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ size' = size - 1
           /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
           /\ tail' = tail

Next == \/ /\ size < K
           /\ Enqueue(1)   \* Producer writes 1
       \/ /\ size > 0
           /\ Dequeue      \* Consumer reads

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>> /\ TypeOK

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS NULL, Server

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [s \in Server |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [s \in Server |-> "Follower"]

Next == \/ \E s \in Server :
          /\ state[s] = "Follower"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
          /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
        \/ \E s \in Server :
          /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        \/ /\ state' = state
           /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
           /\ votedFor' = votedFor

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = 0
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers + 1
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
      \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
      \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Channels

VARIABLES state, channel, markerSent

(* State of each process: 0 = not recorded, 1 = recorded *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {0,1}]
(* Channel contents: sequence of messages *)
ChannelType == [Channels -> Seq(N)]
(* Marker sent flag: 0 = not sent, 1 = sent *)
MarkerType == [Channels -> {0,1}]

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ channel = [c \in Channels |-> <<>>]
        /\ markerSent = [c \in Channels |-> 0]

Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N:
        /\ state[i] = 0
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = 1]
        /\ \E c \in Channels:
            /\ c[1] = i
            /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![c] = Append(channel[c], i)]
            /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![c] = 1]
        \/ \E c \in Channels:
            /\ c[2] = i
            /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![c] = Remove(channel[c], 1)]
            /\ markerSent' = markerSent
        \/ channel' = channel
            /\ markerSent' = markerSent

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, markerSent>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == token = 1

Next == token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_token

====

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
        \/ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

====

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V

VARIABLES ballot, accept, chosen

Init == ballot = [i \in 1..N |-> 0] /\ accept = [i \in 1..N |-> 0] /\ chosen = [i \in 1..M |-> 0]

Next == 
  /\ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V :
       /\ ballot' = [ballot EXCEPT ![b] = b]
       /\ accept' = [accept EXCEPT ![b] = v]
       /\ chosen' = chosen
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V :
       /\ ballot' = ballot
       /\ accept' = accept
       /\ chosen' = [chosen EXCEPT ![p] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<ballot, accept, chosen>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS File, ChunkSize, MaxRetries, Timeout
VARIABLES acked, retransmits, sent, timer

    \* Divide file into chunks
    chunks == SubSeq(File, 1, ChunkSize)

    Init ==
        /\ sent = {}
        /\ acked = {}
        /\ retransmits = [i \in 1..Len(chunks) |-> 0]
        /\ timer = 0

    Next ==
        \/ /\ chunks \notin sent
           /\ sent' = sent \cup {chunks}
           /\ timer' = 0
        \/ /\ chunks \in sent
           /\ chunks \notin acked
           /\ retransmits[chunks] < MaxRetries
           /\ retransmits' = [retransmits EXCEPT ![chunks] = @ + 1]
           /\ timer' = Timeout
        \/ /\ chunks \in acked
           /\ timer' = 0
        \/ /\ timer > 0
           /\ timer' = timer - 1
        \/ /\ timer = 0
           /\ timer' = 0
        /\ sent' = sent
        /\ acked' = acked
        /\ retransmits' = retransmits

    Spec ==
        Init /\ [][Next]_<<chunks, sent, acked, retransmits, timer>>

====
